entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are inherently low in grain Zn concentrations and are targets for bio-fortification

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: Health or plant conditions resulting from a lack of essential micronutrients

entities.name: ZINC CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The level of zinc present in the grain of cereal crops

entities.name: ZINC DEFICIENT SOILS
entities.description: Soils that lack sufficient zinc, contributing to low zinc levels in crops

entities.name: BIO-FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional quality of food crops

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A micronutrient essential for health, targeted for increase in cereal crops

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: Region where bio-fortification actions are being implemented

entities.name: CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: Region mentioned in the research highlights

relationships.description: Cereal crops have inherently low grain Zn concentrations
Zn-deficient soils further reduce Zn concentration in grain
Bio-fortification is applied to cereal crops to increase nutritional value
Bio-fortification targets the increase of Zn in crops
Action for bio-fortification is being taken in West Africa
Cereal crops are grown in areas with high incidence of micronutrient deficiencies
